channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gamedeveloper.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gamedeveloper.com

item.title: The craft of voice acting with Jennifer Hale
item.content:encoded:
GDC Side Quest returns! This month, GDC content marketing manager sits down with veteran voice actress Jennifer Hale for a quick conversation about her career, collaborating with game developers, and her upcoming sessions at the 2026 GDC Festival of Gaming.

Hale's amazing performances have wowed players for years. Not only is she still turning out amazing work in roles big and small across the video game world, she's focused on helping the next generation of developers and performers better understand the voice acting craft. 

Great performances in games are a product of collaboration between creative and technical disciplines, and Hale knows a lot about bringing different craftspeople together.

About GDC Side Quest

The GDC Side Quest podcast is a monthly podcast that celebrates and uplifts the entire game ecosystem, showcasing the people who make games thrive and sharing their lessons with the community. Part of the Game Developer podcast, GDC Side Quest is hosted and edited by Beth Elderkin, and features music by Mike Meehan.

Related:Sword of the Sea composer Austin Wintory wins Grammy award

About the Game Developer Podcast

The Game Developer podcast is a bi-weekly podcast chronicling the triumphs, catastrophes, and everything in-between of game development, sharing lessons and strategies fellow developers can use to hone their craft. The Game Developer Podcast is hosted by Bryant Francis, edited by Pierre Landriau, and features music by Mike Meehan.

Follow Game Developer on Bluesky or on LinkedIn.



https://www.gamedeveloper.com/audio/the-craft-of-voice-acting-with-jennifer-hale
